plugins.name: inbound-ads
plugins.description: Inbound CPH's full Google Ads suite in one plugin: build a new campaign (campaign-build + research/structuring/assets/responsive-search-ads), optimize a live account (soegeterm-analyse, search-term, annonce-optimering, optimering-loop), and standalone deliverables (ads-audit-report, ads-changelog, editor-csv-export, ai-context-publish, kontekst-opdater, opstart-analyse). Danish-default, read-only against Google Ads except HITL-gated confirmed writes.
